EGGW.title: The Dutch Shuttle (4 Legs)
EGGW.description: A classic repetitive 4-leg day. Two back-to-back round trips to Schiphol. Lots of short turnarounds and busy airspace.

EGGW.title: Palma Escapade (2 Legs)
EGGW.description: A standard holiday charter to Palma de Mallorca.

EGGW.title: The Riviera Triangle (3 Legs)
EGGW.description: A less common W-pattern rotation. Drop holidaymakers in Nice, pick up a sector to Amsterdam, then head home to Luton.

EGGW.title: The Capital Jumper (4 Legs)
EGGW.description: A busy day hopping between capitals: Up to Edinburgh, back to Luton, then across the Channel to Paris CDG, and finally home.

EGGW.title: Alpine Challenge (2 Legs)
EGGW.description: A demanding winter rotation into Innsbruck. Requires specific briefing and precision flying for the approach.
